nav.message: Hello, I would like to book an appointment in Ritual.

hero.title: Your time deserves the Ritual
hero.subtitle: At Ritual we listen and take care of your skin with state-of-the-art equipment and expert hands: visible results, in the time you have. Relax — the rest is our ritual.

ariaLabels.map: Map with the location of the salon

topServices.eyebrow: what we do with all that listening
topServices.title: High-tech, gentle hands
topServices.ctaComment: Tell us how you slept this week and we'll choose a ritual for you.
topServices.message: Hello, I would like to get more info about services

items.name: Body pressotherapy suit while facial treatment
items.description: A session of complete relaxation that works on the whole body and the face at once. A specialised suit delivers a lymphatic drainage massage while our cosmetologist treats your face skin according to its type and its needs.

items.name: Microcurrent therapy
items.description: Microcurrent therapy on premium-class equipment reduces swelling quickly and painlessly, restores muscle mobility, eases spasms, aids tissue recovery after surgery and improves skin tone — so you look better and younger without aggressive procedures. It also helps restore facial expression after unsuccessful Botox injections.

items.name: RF lifting
items.description: Improves the tone and turgor of the skin, evens out your complexion and softens the appearance of wrinkles. Works well against skin laxity. Premium equipment.

items.name: Lifting facial massage
items.description: A massage of the face, neck and scalp using adaptive techniques that restore muscle mobility and tone, refine the contour of the face and reduce puffiness. Includes facial care with device-assisted methods and cosmetic products. Lasts one hour.

items.name: Facial carboxytherapy
items.description: Carried out with a dedicated device and cosmetics, this treatment is a pleasure to receive and gives striking results. It evens out tone and complexion, improves the quality and firmness of the skin, and strengthens the skin's own natural defences.

staff.name: Alena
staff.description: Helps preserve youth and natural beauty without radical treatments. Thanks to a personalized approach and professional techniques, skin tone is improved, puffiness is reduced, facial muscles are relaxed, and contours are defined. Each treatment combines care, aesthetics, and visible results.

staff.name: Alena
staff.description: Helps relieve muscle tension, restore strength, and improve well-being. Professional techniques promote relaxation, improve circulation, and restore lightness to the body. Each treatment is tailored to your needs, ensuring you feel comfortable and notice results after just one session.
